roa.docketEntryComment: REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT OF PRELIMINARY HEARING (03/17/22) EFILED

/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X:THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS THE CHARGES PURSUANTTO PENALCODE SECTION 1387(C) AS THE DEFENDANT HAS BEEN RELEASED TOOTHER AGENCY FOR PROSECUTION- FEDERAL INDICTMENT,/VD:05-06-22 TRIAL/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR:05-20-22/CONTD:PHC IN DEPT, 23 & JURY TRIAL IN DEPT, 22/DOP/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/WITEXCL: DEFENSE/WIT SWORN: OFFICER JOHNMURPHY SFPD/EXHMA: PPL 1 8,5 X 11 PHOTO OF DRUGS, DIGITAL SCALE, MONEY ANDGUN/WIT SWORN: SERGEANT PATRICK FAYE SFPD/X: SPANISH INTERPRETER MURIELFALAK TAKES OVER FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER MARGO SEELY/HTA1:1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, AND 7/X: BAIL REMAINS AS PREVIOUSLY SET/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/X:EXHIBITSMARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERINGPARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT 22 ON 03-21-22/

/CAL: STATUS OF M99/INTC/X: DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS GRANTED,//X:THE COURT FINDS BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT RELEASING THE DEFENDANT OR LESS RESTRICTIVE ALTERNATIVES TO INCARCERATION WOULD NOT REASONABLY ASSURE THE DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE AT PRELIMINARY HEARING,/X:THE COURT MAKES FURTHER FACTUAL FINDINGS ON THE RECORD,/NB/CTORD: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X:THE 03-04-22 PRELIMINARY HEARING IS CONFIRMED,/LDPX: 03-07-22 (10), 04-19-22 (60)/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/X:MOTION TO DETAIN FILED/X:ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DETAIN - SIGNED & FILED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) &DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:03-07-22 (10)/X:THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 04-19-22/NB/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD: 02-22-22 FOR STATUS OF M99 #22001674/CONTD: 03-04-22 FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/X:EST, 1 HOUR/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/NP/TRANS 29: FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING//TE: 1 HOUR/LDPX: 03-07-22 (10), 04-19-22 (60)/
